/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_sound_commands.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_sound_commands.dir/tests/test_commands.cpp.o -o test_sound_commands  libcomal-sound.a -lfluidsynth /usr/lib64/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
